results.title: Citi says it's the best buying set-up in this metal in 50 years
results.description: Citi says the US-Iran war and Iran closing the Strait of Hormuz will drive a record aluminium supply deficit, pushing prices to record highs and supporting bullish trades.

results.title: Assam cracks down on officials over pension delays with fines up to Rs 5,000
results.description: District Commissioners and departmental secretaries to review delayed pension cases every month under strengthened monitoring framework

results.title: GE Vernova shares jump 9%; Brokerages raise targets on record order book
results.description: GE Vernova shares jumped 9% after strong Q4FY26 results. Brokerages raised targets on record ₹21,500-crore backlog, exports and HVDC pipeline

results.title: Group 108 Makes Strong Impact at Phygital Retail Convention 2026 in Mumbai, Showcases Vision for Experience-Led Retail Future
results.description: Group 108 showcased its retail vision at the Phygital Retail Convention 2026 in Mumbai, held at Jio Convention Center on May 13–14. With over 3,000 attendees, 1,000+ brands, and 100,000+ sq. ft. exhibition space, the group highlighted ONE FNG and Grandthum as models of experience-led retail transformation and future-ready commercial development.

results.title: Quote of the day by American billionaire Mark Cuban: “Why invest your money in something because a broker told you to? If the broker had a clue, he/she wouldn’t be...”
results.description: Quote of the day by American billionaire Mark Cuban: “Why invest your money in something because a broker told you to? If the broker had a clue, he/she wouldn’t be...”

results.title: JK Cement gets letter of intent for Itauri-Jharkua block mining lease from Madhya Pradesh government
results.description: Madhya Pradesh's mineral resource department had declared JK Cement the 'preferred bidder' for the mining lease of the Itauri-Jharkua Limestone Block on March 19, 2026. It has now received the letter of intent for the block situation in the Itauri and Jharkua villages of the Panna district.

results.description: John Armitage ranks among the richest hedge fund managers in the world. Visa Inc. results.title: Analysts Express Optimism on Amazon (AMZN) Amid AWS and AI Growth
results.description: Paul Marshall and Ian Wace rank among the richest hedge fund managers in the world. Accounting for a 2.52% share ($2.76 billion) in the portfolio, Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) ranks as Marshall Wace’s top stock pick. On May 13, Wolfe Research published its internet sector study, which included Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) among its top picks. Wolfe [...]
